title: calophyllum tomentosum
intro: Calophyllum tomentosum, also known as the 'Pulasan' or 'Bintangor', is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, specifically in the rainforests of Malaysia and Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum tomentosum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, Calophyllum tomentosum is often prepared as an extract or oil, which can be applied topically or consumed orally, and is also used in the production of cosmetics and pharmaceuticals.
